phaseGoal: Ship a combined intake usability and client proof update without weakening the production deployment path.

validationsExecuted.name: npm run test:client-intake
validationsExecuted.evidence: Static validator confirmed form-first intake layout, blur validation, bare-domain normalization, private delivery path, Turnstile handling, and subdomain middleware.

validationsExecuted.name: npm run test:seo-aeo
validationsExecuted.evidence: SEO/AEO validator confirmed Terri's testimonial appears in the client proof source signals.

validationsExecuted.name: npm run test:chat
validationsExecuted.evidence: Workflow chat validator completed against local Cloudflare Pages dev server.

validationsExecuted.name: local Pages intake API smoke test
validationsExecuted.evidence: POST /api/client-intake accepted both currentWebsiteUrl=sample.com and currentWebsiteUrl=www.sample.com in test mode.

highFindings.summary: intake.northvalleyintel.com still needs DNS CNAME intake -> northvalleyintel-com.pages.dev and a live HTTPS smoke test before the subdomain is shared.
